lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear on both the interior and exterior. While it is currently operational, it shows signs of age and may require mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with only minor surface scratches. The interior shows light signs of use on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and usage. Mechanically, the engine is dependable and starts without issue, but you should expect minor oil seepage and the need for a routine tune-up in the near future. The transmission shifts through all gears, though it can feel a bit sluggish during cold starts. Cosmetically, the exterior has several noticeable scratches, small door dings, and some fading in the clear coat on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows visible wear and staining consistent with its mileage. All major safety features and electronics like the lights and heater work, though the air conditioning is currently blowing weak. This is a solid option for someone looking for functional transportation, provided they are comfortable with some ongoing cosmetic and minor mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial investment to return to a reliable state. The body shows significant signs of wear, including several deep scratches, minor rust spots on the wheel wells, and a dent in the rear bumper. Mechanically, the car is struggling; the transmission shifts harshly between gears, and there is a noticeable knocking sound coming from the engine compartment. Additionally, the interior upholstery is heavily worn with some tearing on the driver's seat. It is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise.
This car is a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a dependable and budget-friendly ride! It shows some honest character with visible wear and tear both

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in superlative condition. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, reflecting meticulous care and a heritage of excellence. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail remains in showroom-ready state. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard used-car market, offering the discerning driver an unparalleled experience of quality and performance.

Hey everyone! 🚗✨ I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! It is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, you’d think it just rolled off the lot yesterday. I’ve babied this car since day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive!

This E46 M3 is a definitive example of precision engineering, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, mechanical engagement, paired with a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock for optimal power distribution. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a recent comprehensive VANOS overhaul ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. Rod bearings have been replaced as preventative maintenance, and the suspension retains its original geometry and damping characteristics. A turn-key, museum-grade specimen for the purist seeking uncompromised performance and mechanical integrity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title. Full service history included. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and climate-controlled, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless—no stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent, with the premium leather upholstery remaining supple and entirely free of creases or wear. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the seat heaters, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It drives exactly as it did on day one: tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. Included in the sale are all original keys, the complete owner's manual set, and a custom car cover. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in indistinguishable-from-new condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting pristine aesthetic surfaces and flawless mechanical operation. Meticulously preserved and free of any discernible imperfections, it represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer seeking an uncompromising automotive investment. Professional inspection confirms its status as a benchmark of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in peerless condition. This vehicle has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, resulting in a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every component has been rigorously vetted to ensure uncompromising performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of unrivaled pedigree and preservation, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I'm finally parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she’s a total stunner! This beauty is in truly pristine, mint condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor yesterday. It’s been meticulously cared for, kept sparkling clean, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’ve been looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you! Come say hi and take a look!
Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This example features the iconic S54
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history available.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece, preserved in showroom condition since the day it was driven off the lot. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin feels and smells brand new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple without a single crease, and the high-tech dashboard interfaces are flawless. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full, documented history. It drives with the same precision and smoothness as it did on day one. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been meticulously pampered and stored in a climate-controlled environment.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity remain beyond reproach. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a specimen that transcends the typical market standard, representing the absolute zenith of its production run.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable condition and representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free interior, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this unit offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to secure a showroom-quality asset of the highest caliber.

Wow, you have to see this beauty! It's in truly pristine condition—honestly, it's like-new. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you!
Offering a collector-grade E92 M3, a definitive example of the high-revving S65 platform. This naturally aspirated 4.0L
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Clean title.

For the discerning collector, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality specimen. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish free of any swirls or blemishes, while the interior retains its factory-fresh aroma and pristine, supple leather upholstery. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, supported by a complete, documented service history. This is a true 'time capsule' vehicle, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Not a single detail has been overlooked in preserving this investment-grade motorcar.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark for the model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-caliber condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to the interior or exterior surfaces. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new model, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure its continued distinction. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless specimen.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty. It's in absolutely stunning, showroom-level shape—honestly, you'd think it just rolled off the lot! I've babied this car from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically perfect and ready for your next adventure, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for you to see it in person! ✨

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering. Powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS variable valve timing, the powerplant delivers a linear torque curve and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is impeccably preserved, featuring a reinforced rear subframe and a Getrag 6-speed manual
Mint condition. Low mileage. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a true collector-grade masterpiece that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from even the slightest swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple without any creasing, and every piece of switchgear operates with tactile precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive history of preventative maintenance and a pristine engine bay that looks as though it just rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in showroom condition, offering a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. No accidents, no modifications, and no compromises—just pure automotive excellence for the discerning enthusiast.

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled distinction, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. This specimen exhibits flawless exterior aesthetics paired with a pristine interior, reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically superior and visually striking, it offers the discerning enthusiast a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in absolute peak condition. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our highest benchmarks of automotive excellence.
